Enrollment & Academy Culture

Tune the academy atmosphere and how new students enroll.

Academy Culture

These settings control how students interact with you and respond to conversations. Adjust these to create the academy atmosphere you prefer.

Balanced
← Professional Relaxed →
What this affects:
  • 0-33 (Professional): Formal academy. NPCs keep professional distance, maintain boundaries, and focus on work topics.
  • 34-66 (Balanced): Friendly academy. NPCs are approachable and personable while maintaining appropriate boundaries.
  • 67-100 (Relaxed): Casual academy. NPCs are very comfortable, open about personal topics, and boundaries are more flexible.
Standard
← Reserved Outgoing →
What this affects:
  • 0-33 (Reserved): NPCs are more distant and may seem cold, tsundere-like, or defensive. Harder to build relationships.
  • 34-66 (Standard): NPCs have balanced personalities - some warm, some cool, all realistic and varied.
  • 67-100 (Outgoing): NPCs are friendly, expressive, and eager to connect. Relationships develop more easily.
Professional
What this affects:
  • Professional: NPCs maintain professional boundaries. Flirting/advances require high relationship stats and are met cautiously.
  • Casual: NPCs are open to personal connections once comfortable. Flirting is welcome when trust/affection are moderate.
  • Enthusiastic: NPCs are receptive and interested in all interactions. Everyone's consenting and relationships develop naturally without barriers.
Moderate
← Reserved Severe →
What this affects:
  • Separate from Consent Model above: this dial sets the pace and ceiling of the Discipline tool's tone, not whether NPCs consent to anything.
  • Low: Discipline sessions stay mundane (talking-tos, detention) almost all the time — harsher options are rare, not impossible.
  • High: harsher, more explicit discipline options come up readily.
Student Starting Stats

Control the starting stat ranges for new students. Lower values make relationships feel more earned, while higher values create an easier, more welcoming academy.

⚙️ Presets
Presets apply to all stats. You can fine-tune individual stats below.
Gender Diversity Options

Control the gender distribution of new students. All students will still be female by default (100%), but you can adjust these sliders to introduce variety. Sliders are automatically proportional - they will always add up to 100%.

Welcome to the Headmaster Corner!

Chat with other players from around the world. Share tips, strategies, and stories from your academy empire!

📜 Chat Rules

  • Be respectful to all players
  • No spam or excessive caps
  • Share game tips and help others
  • Have fun and make friends! 🎉

⚙️

Settings

🎮 Game Preferences

Game automatically saves every few minutes

👤 Player Profile

Set up your profile so NPCs can reference you accurately.

🎮 Cheats & Debugging

Modify game values for testing or fun!

📋 Patch Notes

View update history and recent changes.

🌍 Custom World Context

Define custom settings for your game world. NPCs will reference this context in conversations, posts, and events!

Describe your academy's unique setting, location, or theme (spaceship, castle, underwater base, etc.)

Define world rules, supernatural elements, or alternate reality settings

Special instructions for how NPCs should behave or what they should reference

✓ Context saved! NPCs will now use your custom world.

When enabled, ALL adult/NSFW content is disabled:

  • Hides NSFW image request presets
  • Filters explicit social media posts
  • AI conversations stay academy-appropriate
  • Hides adult-themed locations & classes
  • Blocks explicit content generation
Status: NSFW Content Enabled

When enabled, ALL story features and dynamic events are disabled:

  • Hides the Story tab from navigation
  • Disables dynamic event generation (the bell notifications)
  • Stops story progression and moral tracking
  • Removes narrative elements from gameplay
  • Creates a pure sandbox/management experience
Status: Story & Events Enabled

When enabled, AI responses appear word-by-word as they generate rather than all at once. Applies to 1-on-1 chat, group chat, and encounter narration.

Status: Streaming Enabled

🎨 Image Generation Style

Choose the visual style for ALL generated images.

This style will be applied to all future image generations.

👁️ Image Perspective (POV)

Choose the camera perspective for requested images. Affects Chat and Group images, NOT social media posts.

Standard: Shows the scene from an observer's perspective
POV: First-person view - you see what you would see
Selfie: Subject is holding the camera

Automatically generate scene visualizations during conversations.

✨

Prestige Confirmation

Are you sure you want to prestige? This action cannot be undone!

⚠️ What You'll Lose:

  • All current gold
  • All classes and progress
  • Active student assignments & hierarchy
  • All owned locations (except Garage)
  • All duel progress
  • Social feed posts

✅ What You'll Keep:

  • All Influence Points (current + new)
  • Lifetime earnings total
  • Prestige level (increases by 1)
  • All permanent upgrades
  • Player bio and settings
  • 🏛 All students move to Alumni (with full memory)
  • 💬 All chat history & NPC memories preserved
  • 🎁 Gift Shop inventory & generated gifts

🌟 What You'll Gain:

+0
Influence Points
Use these to purchase permanent upgrades that boost all future runs!
💡 Tip: Prestige when you feel your progress has slowed down. The more you've earned, the more influence you'll gain!

📝 Additional Notes

⚧️ Gender Diversity Options

Control the gender distribution of new students. By default, all students are female (100%). Adjust these sliders to introduce more diversity. The sliders are proportional and will always total 100%.

🧬 Race & Species Options

Control the species distribution of new students. By default, all students are human (100%). Adjust these sliders to introduce fantasy and anthropomorphic races. The sliders are proportional and will always total 100%. You can also type exact percentages in the text boxes.

📊 Stat Gain Multipliers

Multiply how fast stats increase. 1x = normal, 10x = 10 times faster

⏰ Time Controls

Control the speed of in-game time progression. Default is 20:1 (20 game minutes = 1 real minute)

20x
1x (Slowest) 50x (Fast) 100x (Fastest)

⏳ Context-Aware Time Dilation

Time flows differently based on what you're doing. Conversations slow down time so you can properly interact.

💬 During 1-on-1 Conversations:
x
👥 During Group Chats:
x

x

⚙️ Group Settings

How many people respond when you send a message without queuing anyone. The most relevant participants answer. Set to 0 for manual-only mode — nobody responds automatically; tap a face above to choose who speaks each turn.

2

💡 Voyeur Mode: You can watch conversations happen between NPCs without being part of the scene. Use the action buttons or /do commands to direct characters. Your messages won't appear as dialogue.

When an NPC speaks, this is the chance they'll address another character instead of the player.

How long before characters start chatting on their own.

Describe the current scene or situation. This context will be included in all AI responses.

This is the narrative context displayed at the top of the chat and used by AI. Usually auto-generated when converting from a 1-on-1 chat.

Min: 5
Max: 12

Auto-vis generates scene images periodically based on conversation activity.
